name: Air / Solo 14mm Water Tool Adapter
summary: Air / Solo 14mm Water Tool Adapter — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Enhance your vaping experience with the Arizer 14mm Water Tool Adapter, designed to seamlessly connect your Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 vaporiser to your favorite bong. Made from high-quality, graded glass, this adapter provides a magical combination, particularly when paired with an ice-filled bong. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
